description: Opening of a dowry list, written under the jurisdiction of David Maimuni in the hand of Emanuel b. Yehiel. The bride's name is Rivqa. The groom is the son of Yehiel the judge, and might be Emanuel himself. The dowry total is 600 dinars (no other financial details are preserved). AA and RR
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
